rows.description: Of Mr Dalby. a surplus of the Bedmakers Account, to be add to the Increment: Domus
rows.notes: Combined the description from two physical lines into a single logical entry, using `gemini-flash`'s accurate text 'add' and 'Increment'. The amount £32 13 0 is clearly associated with this single entry. `gemini-flash`'s original row 24 was dropped as a redundant continuation.

rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash`. Visual verification confirms its full description, the year '1922', and the embedded amount '624.19.0½'. It's identified as a memorandum (Mm.) related to an amount, not a general header. `gpt-5-mini`'s transcription was heavily truncated and misread the year and some text.
